must_detect.matched_text:
Trinetra Composites Limited — privacy and retention workflow (India, DPDPA 2023) for investor relations and board materials.
As Data Fiduciary, we process minimal data from Data Principals contacting IR, and consent is recorded via an auditable form.
We do not request Aadhaar, PAN, or GSTIN; any examples like Aadhaar 0000-1111-2222 or PAN PANNOTVALID appearing in emails are treated as redactions and deleted.
Child data: we do not knowingly process information about individuals under 18; DSARs from guardians follow the DPDPA grievance route.
DSAR and consent withdrawal can be initiated via privacy@trinetra.example or the consent manager portal listed on our website.
SEBI (PIT) compliance: the IR queue excludes UPSI, trading-window closure notices are posted to insiders, and research notes cite only public BSE/NSE releases.
The May 2024 investor release carried an embargo until 20 May 2024 09:00 IST, which has passed and is no longer unpublished price-sensitive information.
Board memo templates include negated MAC language: no MAC/MAE has occurred or is expected as of Q4 FY24 based on public disclosures.
Any reference to a definitive agreement in IR drafts pertains to the already-announced alloy plant divestment to Anantya Metals Private Limited per BSE filing LZ-2024-0510, and no
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
